full_description: BookBuddy is a social networking app designed for book enthusiasts. Create virtual bookshelves to showcase your favorite books, authors, and genres. Connect with like-minded readers, share recommendations, and discover new titles. Join discussions, participate in book clubs, and get updates on upcoming releases. Whether you're a fan of fiction, non-fiction, or anything in between, BookBuddy is the perfect platform to explore and discuss your love for reading.
